hanover-insurance.q: Does Olive Cover offer Hanover insurance?
hanover-insurance.a: Yes. Olive Cover is appointed with Hanover for both personal and business insurance. We place Hanover home, auto, and umbrella for Georgia households (strongest value when you bundle home and auto), and Hanover commercial coverage for small and mid-size businesses, including the business owners policy, general liability, commercial property, commercial auto, and umbrella, plus specialty lines like cyber and professional liability.

Hanover is known for its account-based approach to small and mid-size commercial insurance, with industry-tailored programs across hundreds of business classes and a long track record of working through independent agents. It is competitive on coverage and price for standard, preferred business accounts.

hanover-insurance.q: Is Hanover a good fit for my home and auto?
hanover-insurance.a: Hanover can be a strong everyday-value fit for Georgia households with newer homes, a clean claims history, and standard, preferred drivers, especially when you bundle home and auto together. For higher-value homes or non-standard situations another carrier may fit better, and we will tell you honestly in a free coverage review.

hanover-insurance.q: Is Hanover available in Georgia, and how do I file a claim?
hanover-insurance.a: Yes. Hanover is admitted in Georgia for commercial lines. You can report a claim 24 hours a day at 1-800-628-0250 or through the Hanover claims portal at hanover.com. As your agent, Olive Cover can also help you start and manage a claim.

hanover-commercial-insurance.q: Does Olive Cover offer Hanover insurance?
hanover-commercial-insurance.a: Yes. Olive Cover is appointed with Hanover for both personal and business insurance. We place Hanover home, auto, and umbrella for Georgia households (strongest value when you bundle home and auto), and Hanover commercial coverage for small and mid-size businesses, including the business owners policy, general liability, commercial property, commercial auto, and umbrella, plus specialty lines like cyber and professional liability.

Hanover is known for its account-based approach to small and mid-size commercial insurance, with industry-tailored programs across hundreds of business classes and a long track record of working through independent agents. It is competitive on coverage and price for standard, preferred business accounts.

hanover-commercial-insurance.q: Is Hanover a good fit for my business?
hanover-commercial-insurance.a: Hanover is a strong fit for standard, preferred small and mid-size Georgia businesses, such as main-street retail, professional services, and light contractors, generally in the $500,000 to $25M revenue range. It is usually not the market for large, specialty, or higher-risk accounts.

hanover-commercial-insurance.q: Is Hanover available in Georgia, and how do I file a claim?
hanover-commercial-insurance.a: Yes. Hanover is admitted in Georgia for commercial lines. You can report a claim 24 hours a day at 1-800-628-0250 or through the Hanover claims portal at hanover.com. As your agent, Olive Cover can also help you start and manage a claim.

chubb-commercial-insurance.q: Does Olive Cover offer Chubb insurance?
chubb-commercial-insurance.a: Yes. Olive Cover is a directly appointed Chubb agency. We place Chubb personal lines, including high-value homes, autos, valuable articles, and umbrella, as well as Chubb specialty commercial coverage for eligible Georgia clients.

Chubb specializes in higher-value personal insurance through its Masterpiece program, with homes generally valued above $750,000, extended replacement cost, and high liability limits. It is also strong in specialty commercial lines such as management liability, professional liability, and cyber. Chubb is known for broad coverage terms and responsive claims service.

chubb-commercial-insurance.q: Is Chubb available in Georgia, and how do I file a claim?
chubb-commercial-insurance.a: Yes. Chubb is admitted in Georgia for personal and commercial lines. You can report a claim 24 hours a day by phone at 1-800-252-4670 or through the Chubb claims portal at chubb.com. As your agent, Olive Cover can also help you start and manage a claim.

chubb-insurance.q: Does Olive Cover offer Chubb insurance?
chubb-insurance.a: Yes. Olive Cover is a directly appointed Chubb agency. We place Chubb personal lines, including high-value homes, autos, valuable articles, and umbrella, as well as Chubb specialty commercial coverage for eligible Georgia clients.

Chubb specializes in higher-value personal insurance through its Masterpiece program, with homes generally valued above $750,000, extended replacement cost, and high liability limits. It is also strong in specialty commercial lines such as management liability, professional liability, and cyber. Chubb is known for broad coverage terms and responsive claims service.

chubb-insurance.q: Is Chubb a good fit for my home?
chubb-insurance.a: Chubb is a strong fit if your home is higher-value (generally above $750,000), you have valuable collections or vehicles, or you want higher umbrella limits and white-glove claims service. It is generally not the lowest-cost option for standard mid-market homes, so we will tell you honestly whether it fits your situation.

chubb-insurance.a: Yes. Chubb is admitted in Georgia for personal and commercial lines. You can report a claim 24 hours a day by phone at 1-800-252-4670 or through the Chubb claims portal at chubb.com. As your agent, Olive Cover can also help you start and manage a claim.
